title: tragacantha divaricata
intro: Tragacantha divaricata, also known as the divaricating broom or divaricating Spanish broom, is a spiny shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha divaricata include soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused in water to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
